summary: Tested Free Demo flow fix. All 13 test cases passed. Pricing page Free button says 'Start Free Demo' and links to /demo. Demo mode at /dashboard?demo=true works without authentication, shows demo banner with Upgrade CTA, displays simulated signals, and does NOT redirect to /upgrade. Mobile view (390x844) renders correctly with demo banner visible.
passed_tests: Pricing page Free plan card (data-testid='plan-card-free') is visible
Pricing page Free button (data-testid='plan-free-btn') says 'Start Free Demo'
Pricing page Free button is enabled (not disabled)
Pricing page Free button links to /demo
Demo mode banner (data-testid='demo-mode-banner') is visible with correct text
Demo mode banner has Upgrade button (data-testid='demo-upgrade-btn') linking to /pricing
Demo mode shows simulated signals (BTC, ETH, SOL in Today's AI Signals section)
Demo toggle visible in navbar when in demo mode
Demo mode works for logged-out users (no auth required)
Demo mode does NOT redirect to /upgrade page
Mobile (390x844): Demo dashboard renders correctly with demo banner visible
critical_code_review_comments: DemoModeContext correctly reads ?demo=true from URL params and sets sessionStorage
DemoPage.jsx sets sessionStorage and redirects to /dashboard?demo=true via window.location.href
PricingPage.jsx Free button correctly links to /demo with 'Start Free Demo' text
DashboardPage.jsx shows demo banner with Upgrade CTA when isDemoMode is true
Demo mode bypasses wallet/auth checks - demoMode variable used in conditional rendering
test_credentials: No auth required for demo mode testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - demo mode uses mock data from DemoModeContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: Free Demo flow is fully functional. Pricing page Free button links to /demo which redirects to /dashboard?demo=true. Demo mode works without authentication, shows demo banner with Upgrade CTA, displays simulated signals (BTC, ETH, SOL), and does not redirect to /upgrade. Mobile view renders correctly. All mock data comes from DemoModeContext (signals, portfolio, agents, leaderboard are all simulated).

demo_dashboard.demo_banner_text: You are in Demo Mode — upgrade to unlock real-time signals and live trading.
